instagram_caption:
Week 9 is live: Week 9 Pre-Draw Edition

Pre-draw edition for 25-31 May 2026 . Week 9 pushes the ATP clay calendar into an even more important fantasy window, where player quality still matters but bracket context matters even more. The early objective is to identify likely premium anchors, monitor cumulative workload after a long clay stretch, and isolate ranking-based pricing gaps that could become actionable once the official draw lands and the slate sharpens.

Bonus Ball board: Jannik Sinner, Carlos Alcaraz, Alexander Zverev.
Read the full cheat sheet: https://tennis-automated-fantasy.netlify.app/pages/2026-week-9-pre-draw.html
